title: sesbania grandiflora
intro: Sesbania grandiflora, also known as the Agati or Vegetable hummingbird tree, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sesbania grandiflora include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antidote for snake bites and other poisonous substances. Sesbania grandiflora is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or powder, and is also used in traditional cooking in Southeast Asia.
